Package com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.enumerations

Class TransponderBackscatterErrorCode

java.lang.Object
com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.enumerations.EnumerationBase
com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.enumerations.TransponderBackscatterErrorCode
public class TransponderBackscatterErrorCode extends EnumerationBase
Specifies the error response for Backscatter Errors
